footer.description: Customer experience and business development experts. We support companies in customer acquisition, loyalty, and retention through customized solutions and a human approach.

hero.title: Customer Experience Expert
hero.firstLine: Your partner in optimizing your sales performance,

callToAction.home: Boost your sales performance with customized solutions. From acquisition to loyalty, we transform customer experience into a growth lever.
callToAction.about: At antl, we are more than a service provider—your strategic partner. With a human-centered approach and innovative digital solutions, we support companies in their business development.

ourExpertise.title: Our Expertise
ourExpertise.subtitle: Customized solutions to meet your specific needs

conquest.title: Acquisition
conquest.description: Prospecting, appointment setting, and lead generation.

loyalty.title: Loyalty
loyalty.description: Personalized customer follow-up, proximity through human contact, quality of discourse.

retention.title: Retention
retention.description: Customer recovery and retention, conflict management.

conception.title: Design
conception.description: Generation of administrative tools, CRM, AI integration.

consulting.title: Consulting
consulting.description: Communication, marketing repositioning, brand image optimization.

ourStory.title: Who we are
ourStory.subtitle: We develop a flexible approach to improve sales performance and deliver optimal customer experience.
ourStory.missionDesc: To create a meaningful connection for our partners' brands, by establishing original proximity with their key stakeholders.
ourStory.approachDesc: Permanent flexibility to improve sales performance through operational solutions.
ourStory.commitmentDesc: Teams engaged at all levels of the company to accelerate our partners' business development.
ourStory.visionDesc: The guarantee of personalized support in a value creation approach through innovation.
ourStory.actionDesc: Intervention at every stage of the customer lifecycle to sustainably generate engagement and value (acquisition - development - loyalty – retention).

value1.title: Prospecting Specialists
value1.description: With strong understanding of our partners' sector-specific needs, our sales representatives are trained by us, evaluated and supported with regular updates on market evolution.

value2.title: Personalization Strategy
value2.description: To meet partner expectations, antl ensures daily customer relationship follow-up through statistical analysis of call production and quality, as well as regular feedback to its partners.

value3.title: Rapid Adaptation Capacity
value3.description: Recruitment, reinforcement and team training are dedicated to each project. Remote work allows antl to have a national and international sales network.

value4.title: Choosing antl means...
value4.description: …redefining your communication strategy, outsourcing your sales force, reducing operational costs, improving customer experience quality and loyalty through advanced technologies.

meetOurTeam.title: The meeting of 5 talents who share the same vision
meetOurTeam.subtitle: Meet our team

quote.text: If you want to go fast, go alone. If you want to go far, go together.
quote.author: African Proverb

nousRejoindre.title: Join Us
nousRejoindre.description: We are constantly looking for talents who wish to thrive in a dynamic team and open up to new opportunities.
nousRejoindre.question: Have you completed sales training and/or have significant experience in B2B sales? Do you have good listening skills and excellent diction; do you know how to adapt, bounce back and find a solution to every challenge?
nousRejoindre.answer: We bet on your potential and motivation!
nousRejoindre.details: We offer commercial agent and sedentary sales representative contracts on permanent contracts, with commission-based and/or goal-achievement compensation, in a corporate culture based on Trust, Proximity and Recognition.

getInTouch.title: Contact Us
getInTouch.subtitle: We are here to answer all your questions.

form.placeholderMessage: Describe your need and we will get back to you...

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Find clear, concise answers about our services, processes, and how we help businesses achieve their goals.

items.question: What industries do you serve?
items.answer: We serve clients across industries, including technology, healthcare, finance, retail, and more.

items.question: Can your solutions scale with my business?
items.answer: Yes, our solutions are designed to grow with your business and adapt to changing needs.

items.question: How do you ensure security and reliability?
items.answer: We implement industry-standard security measures and conduct regular reliability assessments.

items.question: Do you offer dedicated teams for ongoing projects?
items.answer: Absolutely! We provide dedicated teams that work exclusively on your projects for consistent results.

whyChooseUs.title: Why choose antl?
whyChooseUs.subtitle: We provide end-to-end solutions to help businesses achieve scalable systems, innovative solutions, and more.

cards.title: Global reach
cards.description: Serving customers worldwide, from startups to Fortune 500 companies across all time zones and markets.

cards.title: Scalable solutions
cards.description: Flexible services tailored to businesses of all sizes with proven scalability frameworks.

cards.title: Expertise you can trust
cards.description: Decades of experience delivering quality solutions with transparent communication.

clientReviews.title: Customer testimonials
clientReviews.subtitle: Discover what our customers say about their collaboration with us. Real experiences from real companies that have transformed their operations.

items.title: Streamlined operations with a custom ERP
items.description: Their complete ERP solution helped us streamline our operations. Our team's productivity increased by 40% in just 6 months, revolutionizing our workflow and improving efficiency.

items.title: MVP delivered ahead of schedule
items.description: We were looking for a partner able to deliver a complete MVP quickly. antl's expert team delivered a fully functional minimum viable product 2 weeks before the schedule.

items.title: Seamless legacy system migration
items.description: The legacy system migration we needed was carried out without any interruption. Their meticulous planning and execution ensured zero business interruption throughout the process.
